os-dependencies/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Upgrade the Lombok dependency version to a newer release.
Configure the maven-compiler-plugin to use the 'release' flag for cross-compilation support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 11 semantics, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the maven compiler release property from 11 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler targets Java 11 bytecode, which is incompatible with the intended Java 21 runtime environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to a snapshot compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the compiler plugin may not fully support or correctly handle Java 21 language features or bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the hardcoded maven-compiler-plugin version in the build plugins section.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the plugin version used in the build matches the upgraded version defined in properties.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the modern release configuration in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: The source and target options are deprecated in newer Java versions; using release is required for correct cross-compilation and feature enforcement in Java 21.
